title: Image-rights record
description: The rights contract for an image the site references (DATA-10). It gives the image gate (plan 01-06) a rightsStatus to enforce. The gate treats the default, and any referenced-but-unmanifested image, as not-cleared (research Pitfall 4). Brand names used as identifiers are not images and are not gated here.

id.description: Stable identifier for the image-rights record.

reference.description: The image path or identifier this rights record applies to.

rightsStatus.description: The rights determination. The gate treats the default and any unknown reference as not-cleared.

justification.description: Required by convention when rightsStatus is fair-dealing-criticism: the plain-English basis for the fair-dealing claim. Recorded here so the rights position is auditable.
